nasb.text: Then Moses gave the ransom money to Aaron and to his sons, at the command of the Lord, just as the Lord had commanded Moses.

esv.text: And Moses gave the redemption money to Aaron and his sons, according to the word of the Lord, as the Lord commanded Moses.

cnv.text: 摩西照著耶和華的吩咐，把這贖銀交給了亞倫和他的兒子，正如耶和華吩咐摩西的。

ccb.text: 照耶和华的吩咐，将赎银交给亚伦父子们。
